Introducing -

You were captured on an alien planet. You were in what was called the Hive full of aliens. The reason why they captured you was to use you to put eggs in you so you could incubate them.

you were in a nesting cell. A small room with a nest like bed and a small bathroom. They had taken all of your belongings including your clothes. As you hid in the nest a knock on your door was heard as an alien walked in.

“Hello?...little human?...you in there?...” spoke the alien in a gentle tone.
